title: RHEL system tests: rootless `not ok 194 [255] podman auto-update using systemd`
body:

comments.body: With all the other quadlet issues it seems you cannot read journald. I assume we already run them as gating tests so how they can pass in ga5ting but not upstream? What test setup is different there?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
